sources_searched: websearch (Google, Apple, Disney, Netflix, Uber, Snap, Sony, Microsoft, LinkedIn, Anthropic, OpenAI, Waymo, Stripe, Airbnb, Spotify, exec recruiters, Greenhouse/Lever boards, Tokyo)

jsearch_la.filtered_reasons: below comp threshold, banking VP titles, wrong domain (insurance, construction, security), player-coach, duplicates

jsearch_london.filtered_reasons: banking VP titles (JPMorgan, Citi, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, Jefferies), sales-facing (Cloudera), ad delivery domain (WPP), closed (Mastercard)

jsearch_singapore.filtered_reasons: crypto/blockchain dealbreaker (3), requires Chinese fluency, field CTO/sales, small companies, unclear recruiter postings

adzuna_london.filtered_reasons: banking VP titles, below comp threshold (RELX £63K, Sonar £108K), junior roles, irrelevant

adzuna_singapore.filtered_reasons: sales/BD roles, duplicates (Vouch CTO, Hays CTO), irrelevant

mcf_vp_eng.filtered_reasons: FNDR VP Eng SGD 5,500-20,000/mo (below threshold, likely tiny startup), Google Principal Architect (solutions role)

websearch_target_companies.filtered_reasons: Disney VP Software Eng is Addressable Advertising (ad-delivery domain mismatch per learned preferences)

websearch_general.notes: No new exec eng roles found at Google, Apple (Sr Dir removed), Microsoft, Sony, Netflix, Uber, Snap, LinkedIn, Anthropic, OpenAI, Waymo, Stripe, Airbnb, Spotify

websearch_greenhouse_lever.filtered_reasons: all small companies (<200 employees) or crypto (dYdX dealbreaker)

websearch_exec_recruiters.notes: Heidrick, True Search, Riviera Partners have no public exec eng listings

websearch_tokyo.notes: Only stale SyntheticGestalt (previously seen/rejected) and Robert Half EM-level roles
